abort_conditions: validated-fixes runtime alias unresolved in runner
attempt to regenerate TALE/S1/external_l1 despite reusable outputs

scoring_plan.primary: paired exact-match vs each baseline and best_external
scoring_plan.secondary: validated_only vs external_only counts, cost-aware call accounting

statistical_tests_plan.paired_binary: McNemar (validated_fixes vs external_l1_max; validated_fixes vs best_external)
statistical_tests_plan.effect_size: paired win-rate delta with Wilson CI

caveats: Recommended set has zero overlap with Stage-2 100 and validated-fix IDs; this is out-of-sample generalization check.
Integrated method predictions for this set require new calls unless replay-only approximation is accepted.

minimal_changes_needed: Add validated-fixes method alias to METHODS registry (or reuse existing runtime ID with case-level allowlist override file).
Add replay mode to ingest precomputed external baseline predictions from casebook instead of regenerating external methods.
